command.coins.reload.success: Config of <coins>Coins²</coins> has been reloaded in {duration}ms.
command.players_only: <error>This command can only be performed by players in-game.
command.coin_not_found: <error>Cannot find a defined coin by identifier '{identifier}'.
command.coins.give.success: Added a coin of '{identifier}' without value to your inventory.

command.coins.setvalue.success: The value of this coin has been set to {format}.
command.currency_not_found: <error>Cannot find a defined currency by identifier '{identifier}'.
command.full_inventory: <error>Cannot perform this action because your inventory is full.
